name: Nairobi

palette.name: Earth Market Brown
palette.rationale: Earthen and warm brown tones appear in older built textures and market materials.

palette.name: Highland Green
palette.rationale: Urban greenery and nearby highland ecology contribute strong green cues.

palette.name: Textile Rose
palette.rationale: Fashion, craft, and festival palettes frequently surface saturated pink-red hues.

editorialSummary: Nairobi's chromatic profile balances earthy urban materials, vivid natural greens, and expressive cultural accents.
